title: Afamefuna
overview: In the heart of Nnewi in Anambra State, genial billionaire, Afamefuna Okoli, and his radiant wife Amaka, throw a lavish funeral party for Afam's deceased father. In the midst of the mega shinding, officers of the Nigerian Police arrive and privately invite Afam's to the station.
